nodes.name: Read Orders For Delivery Tax Invoice

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $node['Attach Delivery Tax Invoice Sheet ID'].json;
return { json: payload, binary: $binary };

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: [

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $('Merge Delivery Tax Invoice Template').item.json;
return { json: payload };

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, paymentStatus: "Submitted", message: "ส่งหลักฐานการชำระเงินเรียบร้อยแล้ว กรุณารอ Admin ตรวจสอบ", orderId: $node["Build Payment Proof Update"].json.orderId, paymentProofUrl: $node["Build Payment Proof Update"].json.paymentProofUrl } }}

nodes.name: Get Copied Delivery Tax Invoice Metadata
Attach Delivery Tax Invoice Sheet ID

parameters.jsCode: const payload = $('Build Purchase Order Payload').item.json; return { json: { ...payload, spreadsheetId: $json.id, copiedFileId: $json.id } };

const payload = $node['Merge Purchase Order Template'].json; const sheets = Array.isArray($json.sheets) ? $json.sheets : []; const sheet = sheets.find(i => i.properties?.title === 'Purchase Order') || sheets[0]; if (!Number.isInteger(sheet?.properties?.sheetId)) throw new Error('No usable sheetId for Purchase Order'); return [{json:{...payload, documentSheetId:sheet.properties.sheetId}}];
return { json: $node['Attach Purchase Order Sheet ID'].json, binary: $binary };

const payload = $('Restore Purchase Order Payload').item.json; const fileId = $json.id || payload.copiedFileId; return {json:{...payload,pdfFileId:fileId,pdfUrl:'https://drive.google.com/file/d/'+fileId+'/view?usp=drivesdk'},binary:$binary};

const body = $node['POST /admin-verify-payment'].json.body || $node['POST /admin-verify-payment'].json; const admins = $input.all().map(i=>i.json); const admin = admins.find(i => String(i.LINE_UID || i.Line_UID || '').trim() === String(body.adminUid || body.lineUid || '').trim() && String(i.Status || '').trim().toLowerCase() === 'active'); if (!admin) throw new Error('Only an active admin may verify payment'); return [{json:{...body,adminUid:body.adminUid || body.lineUid,adminName:body.adminName || admin.Display_Name || admin.Admin_ID || '',verifiedAt:new Date().toISOString()}}];

const request = $node['Authorize Payment Verification'].json; const order = $input.all().map(i=>i.json).find(i=>String(i.Order_ID||'')===String(request.orderId||'')); if (!order) throw new Error('Order not found'); if (String(order.Payment_Status||'').toLowerCase() !== 'submitted') throw new Error('Payment proof has not been submitted'); return [{json:{...request,orderId:order.Order_ID,branchUid:order.LINE_UID,totalAmount:Number(order.Total_Amount||0),subtotal:Number(order.Subtotal||0),shippingCost:Number(order.Shipping_Cost||0),discount:Number(order.Discount||0),otherFee:Number(order.Other_Fee||0),vatAmount:Number(order.VAT_Amount||0)}}];
const payload = $('Build Receipt Payload').item.json; return { json: { ...payload, spreadsheetId: $json.id, copiedFileId: $json.id } };

const payload = $node['Merge Receipt Template'].json; const sheets = Array.isArray($json.sheets) ? $json.sheets : []; const sheet = sheets.find(i => i.properties?.title === 'Receipt') || sheets[0]; if (!Number.isInteger(sheet?.properties?.sheetId)) throw new Error('No usable sheetId for Receipt'); return [{json:{...payload, documentSheetId:sheet.properties.sheetId}}];
return { json: $node['Attach Receipt Sheet ID'].json, binary: $binary };

const payload = $('Restore Receipt Payload').item.json; const fileId = $json.id || payload.copiedFileId; return {json:{...payload,pdfFileId:fileId,pdfUrl:'https://drive.google.com/file/d/'+fileId+'/view?usp=drivesdk'},binary:$binary};

const doc=$node['Build Receipt PDF URL'].json; const money=Number(doc.totalAmount||0).toLocaleString('th-TH',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}); return [{json:{to:doc.branchUid,text:['ยืนยันรับชำระเงินเรียบร้อย','เลขที่คำสั่งซื้อ: '+doc.orderId,'ยอดชำระ: ฿'+money,'ดาวน์โหลดใบเสร็จรับเงิน: '+doc.pdfUrl].join(String.fromCharCode(10))}}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: "Payment verified and receipt created", orderId: $node["Build Receipt PDF URL"].json.orderId, receiptUrl: $node["Build Receipt PDF URL"].json.pdfUrl } }}

nodes.name: Build Admin Payment Proof LINE Message

parameters.jsCode:
function norm(v){return String(v||'').trim().toLowerCase();}
const req=$node['POST /admin-reject-payment'].json; const body=req.body||req; const reason=String(body.reason||body.rejectionReason||'').trim(); if(!reason) throw new Error('Rejection reason is required'); const uid=String(body.adminUid||body.lineUid||'').trim(); const admin=$input.all().map(i=>i.json).find(a=>String(a.LINE_UID||a.lineUid||'').trim()===uid&&norm(a.Status)==='active'&&['owner','approver','approve'].includes(norm(a.Role))); if(!admin) throw new Error('Only an active approver may reject payment'); return [{json:{...body,adminUid:uid,adminName:body.adminName||admin.Display_Name||admin.Admin_ID||'',rejectionReason:reason,rejectedAt:new Date().toISOString()}}];

const req=$node['Authorize Payment Rejection'].json; const order=$input.all().map(i=>i.json).find(r=>String(r.Order_ID||'')===String(req.orderId||'')); if(!order) throw new Error('Order not found'); if(String(order.Payment_Status||'').toLowerCase()!=='submitted') throw new Error('Payment proof is not awaiting review'); return [{json:{...req,orderId:order.Order_ID,branchUid:order.LINE_UID,branchName:order.Display_Name||order.LINE_UID,totalAmount:Number(order.Total_Amount||0)}}];

const p=$node['Validate Payment Rejection'].json; const money=Number(p.totalAmount||0).toLocaleString('th-TH',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}); return [{json:{to:p.branchUid,text:['ไม่สามารถยืนยันการชำระเงินได้','เลขที่คำสั่งซื้อ: '+p.orderId,'เหตุผล: '+p.rejectionReason,'ยอดตามคำสั่งซื้อ: ฿'+money,'กรุณาตรวจสอบและส่งหลักฐานการชำระเงินใหม่อีกครั้ง'].join(String.fromCharCode(10))}}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, rejected: true, message: "แจ้งผลการตรวจสอบไปยังสาขาแล้ว", orderId: $node["Validate Payment Rejection"].json.orderId } }}

Build Admin Payment Proof LINE Message

meta.deliveryNoteVersion: V9 HIDE ZERO QUANTITY CLEAN IMPORT
meta.signatureRows: Row 53=24px, Row 54=4px, Rows 55-57=25px each, Row 58=4px, Row 59=18px
meta.zeroQuantityRule: Items with approved quantity less than or equal to zero are excluded from the Delivery Note before pagination.
